bugs.title: Dashboard fails to load when user has more than 200 projects
bugs.description: When a workspace has more than 200 projects, the main dashboard page returns a 504 Gateway Timeout. This affects approximately 12 enterprise accounts. The error started appearing after the v2.4.1 deployment on July 12.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Create a workspace with 200+ projects, log in, navigate to dashboard

bugs.title: Task assignee dropdown loses selection on mobile Safari
bugs.description: On iOS 17.4 with Safari, selecting an assignee from the dropdown in a task card resets to empty when the user scrolls the page. Does not occur on Chrome mobile.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Open a task on mobile Safari, tap assignee dropdown, select a user, scroll page

bugs.title: CSV export missing custom field columns
bugs.description: When exporting tasks to CSV, columns for custom fields (text, number, date) are missing from the exported file. Standard fields (title, due date, assignee) are present. This was working before the v2.4.0 release.
bugs.steps_to_reproduce: Create a project with custom fields, add tasks with custom field values, export to CSV

engineering_team_context: Three engineers on web, two on mobile, one on data/exports
